title: How GPT-5 helped immunologist Derya Unutmaz solve a 3-year-old mystery
summary: GPT-5 Pro 帮助免疫学家 Derya Unutmaz 解决了一个持续三年的免疫学谜团，揭示了T细胞行为的新见解，这一突破可能支持癌症和自身免疫研究。
highlights: GPT-5 Pro helped solve a 3-year-old immunology mystery
offering insights into T cell behavior
The breakthrough could support cancer and autoimmune research
